steps.t: Watcyn's lost belongings should be scattered around the stairs in Caranost, west of Sírlond.
You have reclaimed Watcyn's belongings -- or, at least, whatever was left. You should return to Watcyn in Sírlond.
Watcyn has asked you to split some of his coin between you and Rendal. Rendal has returned to Sírlond by now.
